channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: This free web-based image editor gives Photoshop a run for its money
item.description: AI image editing may be all the rage, but good old-fashioned image editors are still essential. There’s a problem, though: Windows PCs, Chromebooks, and Macs don’t include exceptional image editors that go beyond the most basic editing needs.
item.dc:creator: Chris Hoffman, Fast Company

item.title: Driverless 'bus of the future' is tested in Barcelona
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — Commuters in downtown Barcelona have been able to ride the bus for free this week. There’s just one catch: this mini-bus has no one at the wheel.
item.dc:creator: HERNAN MUÑOZ and JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Invincible season 4: everything we know so far about the hit Prime Video show's next chapter
item.description: Invincible season 4 is in development at Amazon MGM Studios – here's what we know about the Prime Video show's next chapter.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Over 400 million unwanted and malicious emails were received by businesses in 2024
item.description: Report highlights rising cyber threats, and urges businesses to adopt advanced cybersecurity practices and foster a strong security culture.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: You can now watch a full Metallica concert on Apple Vision Pro
item.description: You don’t need tickets to see Metallica in concert anymore—just a $3,499 Apple Vision Pro headset. Starting today, Apple Vision Pro users can experience Metallica’s 2024 Mexico City concert as an immersive, ultrahigh resolution experience complete with 180-degree video and Spatial Audio.
item.dc:creator: Jocelyn Mintz, Fast Company

item.title: SpaceX launches a new crew to the space station to replace NASA's stuck astronauts
item.description: CAPE CANAVERAL, Fla. (AP) — The replacements for NASA’s two stuck astronauts launched to the International Space Station on Friday night, paving the way for the pair’s return after nine long months.
item.dc:creator: MARCIA DUNN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Vance hopeful 'high-level' TikTok deal will be completed by early April
item.description: Vice President JD Vance said Friday that he was hopeful a deal to keep TikTok operating in the U.S. will be wrapped up by the early April deadline.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Refocusing CISA under Trump: A strategic approach to critical infrastructure defense
item.description: Refocusing CISA's efforts promises to defend against current threats while anticipating and mitigating future challenges, securing America's cyber future. The post Refocusing CISA under Trump: A strategic approach to critical infrastructure defense first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Microsoft’s Patch Tuesday updates: Keeping up with the latest fixes
item.description: Long before Taco Tuesday became part of the pop-culture vernacular, Tuesdays were synonymous with security — and for anyone in the tech world, they still are.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: For March’s Patch Tuesday, 57 fixes
item.description: For so few patches from Microsoft this month (57), we have seven zero-days to manage (with a “Patch Now” recommendation for Windows) and standard release schedules for Microsoft Office, Microsoft browsers (Edge) and Visual Studio.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Still can't get a Fujifilm X100VI? This premium Leica compact costs less, and it's in stock
item.description: The Leica D-Lux 8 is premium compact camera with plenty of appeal, and unlike Fujifilm and Canon rivals, it's currently in stock.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: How technology can lower barriers to employment for Californians with disabilities
item.description: New technology — and its rapid adoption for remote work during COVID-19 — continues to break down many barriers for people with disabilities.
item.dc:creator: CalMatters, The Mercury News

item.title: New AirPods Feature: Apple to Offer Real-Time Language Translation - Bloomberg News
item.description: Apple Inc. is planning a new AirPods feature that allows the earbuds to live-translate an in-person conversation into another language, according to people with knowledge of the matter.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Meta to start testing crowd-sourced fact-checking, based on X example, next week
item.description: Facebook and Instagram parent company Meta Platforms Inc. said Thursday it will begin testing its crowd-sourced fact-checking program, Community Notes, on March 18. It will initially based on a ratings system used by Elon Musk's X. Meta ended its fact-checking program in January.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Trump says TikTok deal is in the works. Here's where things stand with the company
item.description: In less than a month, TikTok could have one or a few new owners, be banned again, or simply receive another reprieve to continue operating in the United States.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 3 of the best LLM integration tools for R
item.description: When we first looked at this space in late 2023, many generative AI R packages focused largely on OpenAI and ChatGPT-like functionality or coding add-ins. Today, the landscape includes packages that natively support more LLM suppliers—including models run locally on your own computer.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Elon Musk claims X being targeted in 'massive cyberattack' as service goes down
item.description: Hours after a series of outages Monday that left X unavailable to thousands of users, Elon Musk claimed that the social media platform was being targeted in a “massive cyberattack.” “We get attacked every day, but this was done with a lot of resources," Musk claimed in a post.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE CHAPMAN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: How the Futures Command is helping Army to envision NGC2
item.description: Joe Welch, the deputy to the commanding general of the Army Futures Command, said the characteristics of need helps define the problem set for industry. The post How the Futures Command is helping Army to envision NGC2 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network
